流行的影響深遠，但我衷心感謝我們的員工、代理和合作夥伴在適應新工作方式並確保為客戶提供無間斷的支援

自疫情大流行開始以來，本集團的各業務團隊反應迅速，積極協助紓緩對社區的影響，同時確保員工安全。本集
團為此廣泛採取多項措拖，包括財政支持、提供醫療物資、免費保障覆蓋、獲取醫療保健資源、精簡服務流程和
加快理賠支付，令我引以為榮。我們一如既往找出每一個可以作出理賠的理由，年內已支付逾160億美元的保險

Consistent with our approach of finding every reason to pay, we paid over US$16 billion in insurance

source_text:
儘管為遏制2019冠狀病毒病傳播的措施導致新業務價值減少至27.65億美元，但隨著外出限制放寬，銷售動力轉
趨正面，並在2021年展開非常強勁的勢頭，首兩個月的新業務價值按年增長15%。我們規模龐大和持續增長的有
效保單組合所帶來的高質素和經常性收入來源，帶動2020年稅後營運溢利增加5%，期內產生的基本自由盈餘則
增長7%。截至2020年12月31日，內涵價值權益創新高，達672億美元，集團當地資本總和法覆蓋率為374%，足

initial_translation: The primary impact of the pandemic on our 2020 financial performance was on new business sales, as containment measures in many of our markets restricted face-to-face sales activities, particularly in the first half of 2020. Although VONB of US$2,765 million in 2020 was 33% lower than in 2019, we rapidly adopted new digital tools and the general easing of movement restrictions supported a recovery in sales momentum. AIA China was the largest contributor to the Group's VONB in 2020 and was our first reporting segment to show a recovery in sales momentum, as the region progressively eased strict lockdowns from March 2020. Excluding Mainland Chinese visitor sales to Hong Kong, which remained at low levels, VONB across our other segments recovered strongly in the second half, growing 23% compared to the first half...

期高出15%。

source_text:
我們的高質素、經常性盈利來源以及對有效保單組合的積極管理，帶動稅後營運溢利增長了5%至59.42億美元，
並使營運溢利率穩定在16.9%。所收取的續保保費增加了10%，經常性保費總額佔2020年所收取保費的90%以
上。稅後營運溢利增長受益於全年顯著正面理賠經驗，其抵銷了新固定收入投資的收益率下跌及假設長期股權投
資回報減少的影響。一如預期，上半年所述的異常正面醫療理賠經驗並未在下半年再次發生，但我們繼續看到此
來源對稅後營運溢利增長的正面貢獻。在友邦保險泰國業務的失效經驗恢復正常的情況下，下半年的續保率有所
改善，而本集團的續保率為95%。

initial_translation: Our high-quality, recurring earnings stream and active management of our in-force portfolio drove OPAT growth of 5% to US$5,942 million and maintained a stable operating margin of 16.9%. Renewal premiums received increased by 10%, with recurring premiums representing over 90% of total premiums received in 2020. OPAT growth benefited from significantly positive claims experience throughout the year, which offset the impact of lower yields on new fixed income investments and the assumed reduction in long-term equity investment returns. As expected, the exceptionally positive medical claims experience noted in the first half did not recur in the second half, but we continued to see a positive contribution from this source to OPAT growth. Persistency improved in the second half as lapse experience in AIA Thailand normalised, with Group persistency at 95%.
compact_translation: Our high-quality, recurring earnings and active in-force portfolio management drove 5% OPAT growth to US$5,942 million, maintaining a stable 16.9% operating margin. Renewal premiums received rose 10%, with recurring premiums exceeding 90% of total 2020 premiums received. OPAT growth benefited from significantly positive claims experience throughout the year, offsetting lower yields on new fixed income investments and assumed reduction in long-term equity investment returns. As expected, the exceptionally positive medical claims experience in the first half did not recur in the second half, but continued contributing positively to OPAT growth. Persistency improved in the second half as lapse experience in AIA Thailand normalised, with Group persistency at 95%.
final_translation: Our high-quality, recurring earnings and active in-force portfolio management drove 5% OPAT growth to US$5,942 million, maintaining a stable 16.9% operating margin. Renewal premiums received rose 10%, with recurring premiums exceeding 90% of total 2020 premiums received. OPAT growth benefited from significantly positive claims experience throughout the year, offsetting lower yields on new fixed income investments and assumed reduction in long-term equity investment returns. As expected, the exceptionally positive medical claims experience in the first half did not recur in the second half, but continued contributing positively to OPAT growth. Persistency improved in the second half as lapse experience in AIA Thailand normalised, with Group persistency at 95%.

source_text:
產生的基本自由盈餘為58.43億美元，增長了7%，是由我們有效保單組合的持續增長和我們對此積極管理所帶
動，這足以抵銷預期投資回報降低的影響。於2020年12月31日，本集團的財務狀況仍然十分強勁，於派付股息
19.97億美元後，自由盈餘為134.73億美元。

source_text:
董事會建議末期股息增加7.5%至每股100.30港仙，並須於本公司應屆股東週年大會上獲股東批准。這使2020年的
全年股息總額為每股135.30港仙，較2019年的全年股息總額上升6.9%。這是秉承友邦保險行之已久的審慎、可持
續及漸進的派息政策，讓集團可把握未來的增長機遇，並且保持財務靈活性。

initial_translation: Although VONB of US$2,765 million in 2020 was 33% lower than in 2019, we rapidly adopted new digital tools and sales momentum was supported by the widespread easing of movement restrictions. AIA China was the largest contributor to the Group's VONB in 2020 and was our first reporting segment to show a recovery in sales momentum as the region progressively eased strict lockdowns from March 2020. Excluding Mainland Chinese visitor sales in Hong Kong, which remained low, VONB in the rest of the Group recovered strongly in the second half of the year, up 23% compared with the first half. The Group's new business momentum has continued to be strong in 2021, with VONB in the first two months 15% higher than in the same period in 2020.

initial_translation: AIA China entered 2021 with successful momentum, with VONB in the first two months recording very strong growth compared to the same period in 2020. VONB of US$968 million in 2020 was 17% lower than in 2019, primarily due to limited sales in the initial outbreak of COVID-19 in the first quarter. New business momentum improved rapidly as movement restrictions eased. VONB resumed our customary seasonal pattern, with greater weighting towards the first half of the year. In 2020, AIA China was the largest contributor to the Group's VONB.
compact_translation: AIA China entered 2021 with strong momentum, with VONB in the first two months recording very strong growth versus the same period in 2020. VONB of US$968 million in 2020 was 17% lower than 2019, primarily due to limited sales during the initial COVID-19 outbreak in the first quarter. New business momentum improved rapidly as movement restrictions eased. VONB resumed our customary seasonal pattern, weighted more towards the first half. In 2020, AIA China was the largest contributor to Group VONB.
final_translation: AIA China entered 2021 with strong momentum, with VONB in the first two months recording very strong growth versus the same period in 2020. VONB of US$968 million in 2020 was 17% lower than 2019, primarily due to limited sales during the initial COVID-19 outbreak in the first quarter. New business momentum improved rapidly as movement restrictions eased. VONB resumed our customary seasonal pattern, weighted more towards the first half. In 2020, AIA China was the largest contributor to Group VONB.

source_text:
在實施旅遊限制後，友邦保險香港業務來自中國內地訪港客戶的新業務銷售自2020年2月初起實際上已暫停，導
致其新業務價值大幅下降。新業務價值利潤率錄得跌幅，反映新業務量減少導致承保開支超支、產品組合變動及
利率下降的影響所致。澳門在2020年9月底恢復中國內地旅客個人遊計劃。這為澳門的中國內地訪澳客戶銷售回
升提供支持，使其在第四季佔友邦保險澳門分公司的年化新保費總額超過三分之一。

initial_translation: Following the implementation of travel restrictions, new business sales from Mainland Chinese visitors to AIA Hong Kong have been effectively suspended since early February 2020, resulting in a significant decline in VONB. The VONB margin recorded a decrease, reflecting the impact of underwriting expense overruns due to reduced new business volumes, changes in product mix and lower interest rates. Macau resumed the Individual Visit Scheme for Mainland China travelers at the end of September 2020. This provided support for a recovery in sales to Mainland Chinese visitors in Macau, which accounted for over one-third of AIA Macau's total ANP in the fourth quarter.
compact_translation: Following travel restrictions, new business sales from Mainland Chinese visitors to AIA Hong Kong have been effectively suspended since early February 2020, resulting in a significant decline in VONB. The VONB margin decreased, reflecting underwriting expense overruns due to reduced new business volumes, product mix changes and lower interest rates. Macau resumed the Individual Visit Scheme for Mainland China travelers at end-September 2020, supporting recovery in sales to Mainland Chinese visitors in Macau, which accounted for over one-third of AIA Macau's total ANP in the fourth quarter.

block_outputs.p20_b31: The VONB margin decreased, reflecting underwriting expense overruns due to reduced new business volumes, product mix changes and lower interest rates.
block_outputs.p20_b32: Macau resumed the Individual Visit Scheme for Mainland China travelers at end-September 2020, supporting recovery in sales to Mainland Chinese visitors in Macau,
block_outputs.p20_b33: which accounted for over one-third of AIA Macau's total ANP in the fourth quarter.
